sections.paragraph: pr.n. Chald. (“Mercury’s leader, lord;” i.e. the leader whom Mercury favours, as if Hermianax; compound of נְבֹו, sar, a prince, and אֲדָן i.q. אָדון lord; comp. Sardanapalus, i.e. the prince, the great lord), [Nebuzaradan], a military commander in the army of Nebuchadnezzar, 2Ki 25:8 Jer 39:9 52:12 .
